docs.title: USP Aero WAAP
docs.text: USP Aero WAAP (Web Application and API Protection) provides secure access to web-based applications and resources, while simplifying the process of configuration and deployment.

docs.title: Overview
docs.text: For hardware or virtual appliance deployments we provide the Aero WAAP ISO installer which installs the FedoraCoreOS base and bootstraps the Aero WAAP container services.

docs.title: Configuring Aero WAAP
docs.text: Aero WAAP provides a sophisticated web-based GUI:

docs.title: Getting Started
docs.text:
To install the Aero WAAP service, follow the installation instructions for the Aero platform:

  • https://docs.united-security-providers.ch/usp-aero/aero-platform/installation.html
